caption: A screen recording displays a live stream interface focused on a sports card break. A white list on the left side tracks names associated with NBA team abbreviations, such as "Michael Logueoro: ORL," "Ryan Presnell: OKC," and "Carl Hagdorm: LAL." On the right, a chat window contains text, including a message that says, "Click the link for the BREAK SCHEDULE, SHIPPING INFO and MORE >>> https://n1.live/CaseSke9" and a user named Oh! asking, "Thought this was a 10 spot giveaway filler?" A webcam overlay in the bottom right corner shows a man with a beard wearing a black shirt, sitting in front of a background with sports cards and a "JASYPS" logo. Throughout the sequence, the man remains stationary, and the list of names on the left is scrolled through, updating the visible team assignments. The "CASEBREAKS.COM" logo is visible at the bottom of the screen.
